seconds.vision_desc: glass jar candle sitting on a round black electric warmer plate
entire top layer of wax liquid and glossy, no flame anywhere
gentle shimmer rising off the melt surface
lamp light glinting across the liquid wax
slow even melt, jar walls clean
close view of the glossy pool and plate edge
stillness, just heat shimmer over the wax
final framing of the flameless warmer melt

windows.embed_text: a glass jar candle on a round electric candle warmer plate, the whole top layer liquid and glossy, no flame, gentle shimmer above the melt, warm lamp light on a wooden side table | flameless candle warmer melting the top layer
